qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum number of projects a Primary Investigator (PI) can own?
qa_pairs.answer: A PI may own up to 3 projects.

qa_pairs.question: What is the limitation on the total quota for all projects owned by a Primary Investigator?
qa_pairs.answer: The sum of all project quotas must be within the RAS allocation limits.

qa_pairs.question: What types of Cloud Rapid Access Service (RAS) allocations can a Primary Investigator (PI) have?
qa_pairs.answer: A PI may have both compute and persistent cloud RAS allocations.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find instructions on how to manually create my first virtual machine (VM)?
qa_pairs.answer: The cloud quick start guide describes how to manually create your first VM.

qa_pairs.question: Which resource should I review to learn definitions of common cloud-related topics?
qa_pairs.answer: You should review the Cloud Technical Glossary to learn definitions of common topics.

qa_pairs.question: What should I take into account regarding storage when setting up my cloud environment?
qa_pairs.answer: You should consider storage options best suited to your use case.
